name: set_physics_settings
description: Sets physics simulation parameters (Project Settings > Physics). Supports gravity, bounce_threshold, sleep_threshold, default_contact_offset, and layer collision matrix.

property.description: The physics setting to change. 'gravity_y' is shorthand to set only the Y component of gravity.

value.description: The new value. Format depends on property: gravity='0,-9.81,0' (Vector3); gravity_y='-20' (float); bounce_threshold/sleep_threshold/default_contact_offset=float; layer_collision='LayerA,LayerB,true' (true=ignore, false=collide).
